name: Tunnel of Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
Glaze Preparation
3/4 cup powdered sugar
1/4 cup cocoa powder
2 tablespoons milk
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 10-inch tube pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the butter and sugar until light and creamy.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Gradually mix in the powdered sugar until smooth.
6. Using a spatula or wooden spoon, stir in the flour, cocoa powder, and chopped walnuts by hand.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared tube pan.
8. Bake for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow the cake to cool completely at room temperature.
10. In a small bowl, whisk together the powdered sugar, cocoa powder, and milk for the glaze until smooth.
11. Drizzle the glaze over the cooled cake.
